title: MusicGenreClassifier
summary: A real-time music genre classifier using a fine-tuned DistilHuBERT model and Gradio web interface.
content: This project uses a fine-tuned DistilHuBERT model to classify music genres from the GTZAN dataset. It features a real-time web interface built with Gradio for seamless audio uploads and recording.

title: AtomPDF
summary: A premium, ad-free PDF utility built with Flutter for seamless merging, splitting, and compressing of documents. Published on PlayStore.
content: AtomPDF is a lightweight, ad-free mobile application designed for seamless PDF management. It offers essential tools like merging, splitting, and compressing PDFs without intrusive ads or paywalls, focusing on speed and simplicity.

title: ChatStat
summary: A Streamlit-based WhatsApp chat analyzer designed to provide insightful statistics and visualizations.
content: A Streamlit-based WhatsApp chat analyzer designed to provide insightful statistics about your conversations and visualizations like word clouds, sentiment analysis, and activity maps.

title: ResearchAssistant
summary: A Streamlit-based research assistant that uses LangGraph to build a multi-step workflow for searching academic papers on arXiv.
content: A Streamlit-based research assistant that uses LangGraph to build a multi-step workflow for searching academic papers on arXiv, selecting one, and performing question answering directly on its content.

title: SLM_Skeleton
summary: A modular, research-friendly Transformer architecture for building and experimenting with small-scale language models.
content: A modular, research-friendly Transformer architecture for building and experimenting with small-scale language models — designed for learning, exploration, and open research.
